description_long: This is a modern, freestanding shelving unit with a combination of open shelves and a closed cabinet section at the bottom. The structure is primarily composed of wood, featuring three evenly spaced open shelves above a two-compartment base. The base includes two doors, each with a distinct color: one lighter and one darker, adding a visual contrast to the design. The sides and shelves are constructed from a lighter wood, while the back and base have a darker wood finish. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways.
description: A modern wooden shelving unit with three open shelves and a two-door cabinet base in contrasting wood tones. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves and a two-door cabinet base with contrasting light and dark wood panels.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the thickness of the wooden panels, with the cabinet base visible at the bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel and the full width of the cabinet base, with no visible doors or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the profile of the shelves and the cabinet base.
